introSection: Loop the Loop was a wooden roller coaster that was formerly located at Cedar Point. It operated from 1902 to 1909.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Possibly a figure-eight shaped roller coaster, possibly similar to Leap-The-Dips at Lakemont Park.

fullText:
Loop the Loop was a wooden roller coaster that was formerly located at Cedar Point. It operated from 1902 to 1909.

Possibly a figure-eight shaped roller coaster, possibly similar to Leap-The-Dips at Lakemont Park.
